Container.Name: ai-tg-bot
Container.Overview: Personal Telegram AI assistant powered by Codex app-server, with persistent conversation memory, file processing, web tools, image generation, and per-thread shell workspaces.
Container.Requires: A Telegram bot token, OpenRouter API key, Tavily API key, and a reachable Docling server.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent SQLite database, Codex authentication and configuration, home directory, and cache state.

Config.Name: User Files
Config.Description: Persistent Telegram uploads, generated files, and per-thread shell workspaces.

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: BotFather token used to receive updates and call Telegram APIs.

Config.Name: Telegram Admin ID
Config.Description: Telegram numeric user ID allowed to administer the bot and bypass invite checks.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: OpenRouter API key used for embeddings and retrieval vectors.

Config.Name: Tavily API Key
Config.Description: Tavily API key used by the web search and page extraction tools.

Config.Name: Docling URL
Config.Description: Base URL of a reachable Docling server. Use its container name on a shared custom network or its LAN address and exposed port.

Config.Name: Home Directory
Config.Description: Persistent home directory inside the appdata mount.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: SQLite database URL. Keep this path in appdata so the database and WAL files remain persistent.

Config.Name: Codex Home
Config.Description: Persistent Codex authentication and configuration directory.

Config.Name: Bash Workspace Root
Config.Description: Root directory for persistent per-thread just-bash virtual workspaces.

Config.Name: Codex Model
Config.Description: Codex app-server model for normal chat turns.

Config.Name: Codex Compaction Model
Config.Description: Codex model for compaction summaries and compaction-time image descriptions.

Config.Name: Codex Image Model
Config.Description: Codex image generation model.

Config.Name: Codex Image Quality
Config.Description: Image generation quality: low, medium, high, or auto.

Config.Name: Codex Image Timeout
Config.Description: Maximum milliseconds for one generated-image turn. Set to 0 to disable the hard cap.

Config.Name: Codex Speed Mode
Config.Description: Codex service tier mode: standard or fast.

Config.Name: Codex Verbosity
Config.Description: Codex model output verbosity: low, medium, or high.

Config.Name: Codex Turn Timeout
Config.Description: Maximum milliseconds for one Codex turn. Set to 0 to disable the hard cap.

Config.Name: Reasoning Effort
Config.Description: Reasoning effort for normal chat turns: none, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh, max, or ultra.

Config.Name: Reasoning Summary
Config.Description: Reasoning summary verbosity: auto, concise, detailed, or none.

Config.Name: OpenRouter Embedding Model
Config.Description: OpenRouter model used for file, message, summary, and retrieval vectors.

Config.Name: Context Warning Ratio
Config.Description: Fraction of usable context that triggers context-limit handling before a turn is sent.

Config.Name: Docling Timeout
Config.Description: Docling conversion timeout in milliseconds.

Config.Name: File Inline Tokens
Config.Description: Maximum estimated file tokens to inline before chunking and search indexing.

Config.Name: Bash Timeout
Config.Description: Maximum milliseconds for one just-bash tool execution.

Config.Name: Bash Max Output
Config.Description: Maximum characters returned for each bash stdout or stderr stream.

Config.Name: Draft Update Interval
Config.Description: Minimum milliseconds between streaming draft or status edits. Set to 0 to disable throttling.

Config.Name: Onboarding Timezone Delay
Config.Description: Delay in milliseconds before sending the onboarding timezone prompt.

Config.Name: Stream Delta Characters
Config.Description: Number of characters per text or reasoning stream chunk before draft rendering.

Config.Name: Recent Window Messages
Config.Description: Number of newest messages preserved verbatim when compacting a thread.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Minimum logger level: debug, info, warn, or error.
